                    "text": "o_Transparent](https://d2q4gipm2ebkzp.cloudfront.net/icons/clints-icons/MC_Logo_Transparent 2.svg)\n\nAwesome work done by the Gramosoft Team and we are very satisfied with their Design and Creativity. The team is very flexible and patience and ready to showcase many options until we finalize the page content. The deliverables are on time and we are very happy with their development work. Way to go! #### Sarah\n\nHR - Admin\n\n![vesnunlogo](https://d2q4gipm2ebkzp.cloudfront.net/icons/clints-icons/vesnunlogo 2.svg)\n\nWorking with Gramosoft has been an absolute pleasure. Their team of skilled professionals is not only knowledgeable in their field but also dedicated to providing top-notch service and support. They took the time to understand our unique needs in the mobile/web booking applications and developed a tailored solution that exceeded our expectations. We have found them to be very responsive and technically competent in their field of work. I can recommend Gramosoft highly enough for a",

                    "text": "imelines yet keeping your delivery consistent. #### Rajat Somani\n\nDirector Cloud Consulting\n\n![Numentica - Cloud Consulting Client Testimonial for Gramosoft Chennai](https://d2q4gipm2ebkzp.cloudfront.net/icons/clints-icons/numentica_logo 1.svg)\n\nThis team is very responsive and assisted us in fixing the issues asap especially on production issues and when client/partner's requests. Good team work. Quick workaround on the out of office hours and weekend is one of their biggest key strength that wanting us to keep continue working with them. #### Devindran Raman\n\nCTO\n\n![GMAT Client Review - CTO Testimonial for Gramosoft Chennai](https://d2q4gipm2ebkzp.cloudfront.net/icons/clints-icons/gmat.svg)\n\nRajesh and team have the strong technical and the design team. They are so good at Web and mobile developments. We had a very good relationships for their Continuous on-time reply and deliverables. Gramosoft have the Strong team to handle larger level projects in any industry\n\n#### Mithunn\n\nOpera",

                    "text": "und on the out of office hours and weekend is one of their biggest key strength that wanting us to keep continue working with them. #### Devindran Raman\n\nCTO\n\n![GMAT Client Review - CTO Testimonial for Gramosoft Chennai](https://d2q4gipm2ebkzp.cloudfront.net/icons/clints-icons/gmat.svg)\n\nRajesh and team have the strong technical and the design team. They are so good at Web and mobile developments. We had a very good relationships for their Continuous on-time reply and deliverables. Gramosoft have the Strong team to handle larger level projects in any industry\n\n#### Mithunn\n\nOperations head\n\n![zcodia](https://d2q4gipm2ebkzp.cloudfront.net/icons/clints-icons/zcodia.svg)\n\n![Previous slide](https://d2q4gipm2ebkzp.cloudfront.net/img/product-development/Vector.svg)![Next slide](https://d2q4gipm2ebkzp.cloudfront.net/img/product-development/arrow.svg)\n\n##  Our Clients\n\nBy blending in our service excellence, we have designed purpose-specific digital transformation strategies with our cross-doma",

                    "tenant_id": "74c7b072-8764-4a85-833d-355847ecc147",

                    "id": "6a4469e0-12f3-4154-9b17-3c24d9789dfb",
                    "text": ". The deliverables are on time and we are very happy with their development work. Way to go! #### Sarah\n\nHR - Admin\n\n![vesnunlogo](https://d2q4gipm2ebkzp.cloudfront.net/icons/clints-icons/vesnunlogo 2.svg)\n\nWorking with Gramosoft has been an absolute pleasure. Their team of skilled professionals is not only knowledgeable in their field but also dedicated to providing top-notch service and support. They took the time to understand our unique needs in the mobile/web booking applications and developed a tailored solution that exceeded our expectations. We have found them to be very responsive and technically competent in their field of work. I can recommend Gramosoft highly enough for any business seeking innovative software solutions and exceptional customer care. #### Carmen Chin\n\nDirector\n\n![kronetec](https://d2q4gipm2ebkzp.cloudfront.net/icons/clints-icons/kronetec 1.svg)\n\nRajesh and Team has helped us revamp our website in an impressive way with good look and feel and overall design ",
                    "position": 9,

                    "text": "o_Transparent](https://d2q4gipm2ebkzp.cloudfront.net/icons/clints-icons/MC_Logo_Transparent 2.svg)\n\nAwesome work done by the Gramosoft Team and we are very satisfied with their Design and Creativity. The team is very flexible and patience and ready to showcase many options until we finalize the page content. The deliverables are on time and we are very happy with their development work. Way to go! #### Sarah\n\nHR - Admin\n\n![vesnunlogo](https://d2q4gipm2ebkzp.cloudfront.net/icons/clints-icons/vesnunlogo 2.svg)\n\nWorking with Gramosoft has been an absolute pleasure. Their team of skilled professionals is not only knowledgeable in their field but also dedicated to providing top-notch service and support. They took the time to understand our unique needs in the mobile/web booking applications and developed a tailored solution that exceeded our expectations. We have found them to be very responsive and technically competent in their field of work. I can recommend Gramosoft highly enough for a",

                    "text": "und on the out of office hours and weekend is one of their biggest key strength that wanting us to keep continue working with them. #### Devindran Raman\n\nCTO\n\n![GMAT Client Review - CTO Testimonial for Gramosoft Chennai](https://d2q4gipm2ebkzp.cloudfront.net/icons/clints-icons/gmat.svg)\n\nRajesh and team have the strong technical and the design team. They are so good at Web and mobile developments. We had a very good relationships for their Continuous on-time reply and deliverables. Gramosoft have the Strong team to handle larger level projects in any industry\n\n#### Mithunn\n\nOperations head\n\n![zcodia](https://d2q4gipm2ebkzp.cloudfront.net/icons/clints-icons/zcodia.svg)\n\n![Previous slide](https://d2q4gipm2ebkzp.cloudfront.net/img/product-development/Vector.svg)![Next slide](https://d2q4gipm2ebkzp.cloudfront.net/img/product-development/arrow.svg)\n\n##  Our Clients\n\nBy blending in our service excellence, we have designed purpose-specific digital transformation strategies with our cross-doma",

                "id": "33fd1d86-27a5-49bd-b861-c9003c11ba50",

                    "tenant_id": "74c7b072-8764-4a85-833d-355847ecc147",

                    "id": "33fd1d86-27a5-49bd-b861-c9003c11ba50",
                    "text": ". The deliverables are on time and we are very happy with their development work. Way to go! #### Sarah\n\nHR - Admin\n\n![vesnunlogo](https://d2q4gipm2ebkzp.cloudfront.net/icons/clints-icons/vesnunlogo 2.svg)\n\nWorking with Gramosoft has been an absolute pleasure. Their team of skilled professionals is not only knowledgeable in their field but also dedicated to providing top-notch service and support. They took the time to understand our unique needs in the mobile/web booking applications and developed a tailored solution that exceeded our expectations. We have found them to be very responsive and technically competent in their field of work. I can recommend Gramosoft highly enough for any business seeking innovative software solutions and exceptional customer care. #### Carmen Chin\n\nDirector\n\n![kronetec](https://d2q4gipm2ebkzp.cloudfront.net/icons/clints-icons/kronetec 1.svg)\n\nRajesh and Team has helped us revamp our website in an impressive way with good look and feel and overall design ",
                    "position": 9,

                    "text": "imelines yet keeping your delivery consistent. #### Rajat Somani\n\nDirector Cloud Consulting\n\n![Numentica - Cloud Consulting Client Testimonial for Gramosoft Chennai](https://d2q4gipm2ebkzp.cloudfront.net/icons/clints-icons/numentica_logo 1.svg)\n\nThis team is very responsive and assisted us in fixing the issues asap especially on production issues and when client/partner's requests. Good team work. Quick workaround on the out of office hours and weekend is one of their biggest key strength that wanting us to keep continue working with them. #### Devindran Raman\n\nCTO\n\n![GMAT Client Review - CTO Testimonial for Gramosoft Chennai](https://d2q4gipm2ebkzp.cloudfront.net/icons/clints-icons/gmat.svg)\n\nRajesh and team have the strong technical and the design team. They are so good at Web and mobile developments. We had a very good relationships for their Continuous on-time reply and deliverables. Gramosoft have the Strong team to handle larger level projects in any industry\n\n#### Mithunn\n\nOpera",
